summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Upstox Regime-Adaptive Trading System MVP. 25/26 pytest cases passed (1 transient ingress 502 on /api/ root that passes on retry — 3/3 manual curl retries returned 200). All major FE pages (Dashboard, Backtest, Settings) render correctly with full Control Room grid. Paper trade open→close flow works end-to-end with optimistic UI updates and toast feedback. Charges math formulas match spec exactly.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 Bad Gateway at ingress (approx 1 in 30 hits). Retry on same URL immediately returns 200 (3/3). Likely k8s ingress cold-path; backend is healthy.

ui_bugs.issue: Raw HTML tags (e.g. Upstox Bot Online) rendered as plaintext instead of parsed/stripped. Telegram messages are composed with HTML parse_mode, so the log should either strip tags or render them safely (DOMPurify).

issues: With synthetic data + ₹100/RT charges, backtest shows NET P&L -₹33,464 (charges ₹54,281 > gross ₹20,817). Expected behavior per mocked data note, but users may misinterpret — consider an info banner clarifying deterministic-synthetic nature when yfinance is blocked.
'Save Changes' button correctly disabled until form is dirty (good UX). 'Toggle' paper-mode button has amber border while other buttons white — intentional highlight; OK.

action_items: [LOW] Sanitize/strip HTML tags from Telegram recent log before rendering (TelegramPanel.jsx) — currently shows '...' literally.
[INFO] Consider surfacing a small 'using synthetic market data' badge when yfinance is unreachable so the Bear-regime lock + negative backtest are understood by user.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py duplicates 'from trading.charges import calc_charges' inside seed_demo (line 375 and line 392). Harmless but remove duplicate import.
Telegram recent log rendering stores HTML-formatted message text (with <b>, emoji) but the UI renders it as plain text — inconsistency between sender formatting and display.
paper_open endpoint intentionally does NOT enforce hard-gates (Bear regime) — confirmed per agent note, but worth an explicit comment in the code path so future maintainers don't 'fix' it.
All files reasonably sized (<700 lines). server.py at 436 lines is fine. MongoDB _id excluded properly via projections.
Every interactive element has data-testid — good test coverage.
Weights sum to 1.00 exactly (40+15+15+20+10). Defaults correct: capital=600000, max_daily_loss=1000, target_gross=4500, signal_threshold=0.68.
seed_data_creation: Called POST /api/seed-demo during tests; creates 5 sample paper trades (overwrites previous). Also opened/closed RELIANCE paper position to validate full flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. Full paper trade lifecycle validated (open RELIANCE → position appears in Positions panel → close → trade appears in Trade History with gross/charges/net columns). Backtest returns 610 trades, sharpe -0.47, max DD -₹51,673 with synthetic data — NEGATIVE net P&L is expected due to ₹100/RT vs small price moves. Dashboard Risk Monitor correctly shows BLOCKED because synthetic regime = Bear 88%. Minor: Telegram recent log displays raw HTML tags.
rca_of_issues: Transient 502 on /api/ is ingress-level, not backend. Confirmed backend healthy via 3 consecutive 200 responses post-failure. Test can be hardened with retry fixture if flakiness recurs.
